nasb.text: so that my imprisonment in the cause of Christ has become well known throughout the whole praetorian guard and to everyone else,

esv.text: so that it has become known throughout the whole imperial guard and to all the rest that my imprisonment is for Christ.

cnv.text: 以致整個宮裡的衛隊和其餘一切的人，都知道我是為了基督才受捆鎖的；

ccb.text: 连所有的皇家卫兵和其他众人都知道我是为了基督的缘故而受囚禁。

csbs.text: 以致整个王宫卫队和所有其余的人，都清楚我是为基督的缘故被捆锁的；
